title: Big Globe - It Takes a Pillage Compatibility
description: Big Globe - It Takes a Pillage Compatibility
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-it-takes-a-pillage-compatibility)

A compatibility mod/datapack for [It Takes a Pillage](https://modrinth.com/mod/it-takes-a-pillage) or [It Takes a Pillage Continuation](https://modrinth.com/mod/it-takes-a-pillage-continuation/versions?version=1.21.1&loader=fabric), makes all structures generate correctly in [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

If you can't locate a structure with /locate, I recommend using mod ([Explorer Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass))

![camp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cc5f188a3f713b062b417b8eb464e0e0bb40408_0.webp)
![bastille](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b50b6a65bdeb644a6f4699e1adb9141da2f0a4e_0.webp)
